mapper.sql: SELECT DATA_LNKG_ID AS linkLogSn , DATA_LNKG_TYCD AS linkTypeCd , DATA_LNKG_SCSYN AS linkSucYn , DATA_LNKG_RSLT_CD AS linkRsltCd , DATA_LNKG_RSLT_CTS AS linkRsltCts , ADD_CNT AS addCnt , MOD_CNT AS modCnt , DEL_CNT AS delCnt , DATA_LNKG_DTTM AS linkDttm FROM LOG_AIS_SMSTR_DATA_LNKG
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TermLinkMgrResultDAO.list 설 명 : 학사연동 로그 목록 */
